pois.name: Kodiak Cruise Pier
pois.notes: Pier in downtown Kodiak. Walking distance to museums and harbor.

pois.name: Kodiak NWR Visitor Center
pois.notes: National Wildlife Refuge exhibits about Kodiak bears and island ecology.

pois.name: Baranov Museum
pois.notes: Russian-era museum in oldest building in Alaska. Erskine House (1808).

pois.name: Fort Abercrombie State Park
pois.notes: WWII military bunkers, tide pools, whale watching. 4 miles from town.

pois.name: St. Paul Harbor
pois.notes: Active commercial fishing harbor. Alaska largest fishing fleet.

pois.name: Holy Resurrection Cathedral
pois.notes: Russian Orthodox church (1794). Oldest parish in Alaska. Blue onion dome.

pois.name: Near Island Trail
pois.notes: Easy 2.5-mile loop with harbor and mountain views. Accessed by bridge.

pois.name: Pillar Mountain
pois.notes: Drive or hike to summit for panoramic views of Kodiak and surrounding waters.

pois.name: Kodiak Fisheries Research Center
pois.notes: NOAA research facility with public aquarium and touch tanks.

pois.name: Buskin River State Recreation Site
pois.notes: Salmon fishing, bear viewing, and coastal scenery near the airport.
